templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (MNDA)
templates.description: A standard mutual NDA created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law. Covers confidential information exchanged between two parties evaluating a potential business relationship.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: The cover page template to accompany the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Parties fill in the business-specific terms (names, governing law, etc.) and sign this document; it incorporates the MNDA Standard Terms by reference.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: A standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. Covers subscription terms, data handling, liability, and other standard SaaS commercial terms.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: A standard agreement between a software vendor and an early-stage design partner (customer) who helps shape product development in exchange for early or discounted access. Covers feedback obligations, IP ownership, and limited-use rights.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: A standard SLA designed to be used alongside the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement (CSA). Defines uptime commitments, measurement methodology, and remedies for service failures.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: A standard agreement for professional and consulting services engagements. Covers statements of work, deliverables, payment terms, IP ownership, and confidentiality for time-and-materials or fixed-fee projects.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: A standard data processing agreement governing how a vendor processes personal data on behalf of a customer. Addresses GDPR and equivalent data-protection requirements including sub-processors, data subject rights, and breach notification.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: A standard agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software. Covers license scope, restrictions, maintenance and support, payment terms, and liability, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: A standard reseller and referral partnership agreement. Covers partner tiers, revenue share, lead registration, co-marketing obligations, IP usage, and termination rights for technology partnership programs.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: A short-term evaluation or trial agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract. Covers pilot scope, duration, fees (if any), data handling, and transition to a full agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: A standard HIPAA Business Associate Agreement governing the handling of Protected Health Information (PHI) by a service provider on behalf of a covered entity. Addresses permitted uses, safeguards, breach reporting, and termination.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: An addendum to be attached to a commercial agreement (e.g. CSA or Software License Agreement) when the product or service incorporates AI/ML capabilities. Addresses AI-specific concerns such as training data usage, output accuracy disclaimers, and acceptable-use restrictions.
